entries: Phase 149: hard-merge Ideas into Planning (Planning owns Ideas lifecycle)
IdeaPlan kernel, idea-row, and brainstorm live under planning/
Shared dispatcher + Planning-only registry cutover (28 commands)
Unified IdeaPlan dashboard default-on with emergency kill-switch
Ideas WorkflowModule shell deleted; frozen command/sync/MCP contracts preserved
Ideas git-sync domain contract verified (ideas domain, planning.idea.* kinds)
